title: codereview-pass-3: gateway_config truncation test misses -ENAMETOOLONG coverage
description: The test_decode_rejects_invalid_manual_source_name_bytes only checks -EINVAL for bad bytes. Does not test new length-based -ENAMETOOLONG for source_name. Edge case incomplete for the fix.
close_reason: Fixed gateway_config truncation test and decoder to include -ENAMETOOLONG coverage for oversize source_name (split check in decode_manual_location:342, added too_long test case). Fixed 2 codereview beads (missing include, struct init). 3 clean review passes completed with all P0-P4 addressed. No more real issues.
